style: Premium broadcast intermission card with mechanical editorial rhythm: deep navy, warm off-white, vivid lime, and coral. A bold pause symbol owns the left third while the headline sits low and right; fast rails contrast with a composed central hold. Gaming energy without generic neon or dashboard-card clutter.
font: Space Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, Arial, sans-serif

layout.secondary_focal_point: oversized coral pause bars centered near x=360, y=430
layout.composition: Deliberately split and asymmetric: tactile pause monolith in the upper-left; right-lower headline with RIGHT isolated in lime; a diagonal corridor of moving rails connects them. Headline 132-154px, uppercase, 700-800; subheadline 36-42px.

elements.look: deep navy with offset horizontal track lines at 14% opacity
localized coral radial bloom behind pause monolith at 18% opacity
cropped repeated BACK / BACK / BACK strip crossing the top edge at 12% opacity
off-white 320px square outline, slightly rotated -4 degrees
two thick coral vertical bars with lime end caps
small lime INTERMISSION / HOLD label aligned to headline cap line
off-white hero type with RIGHT filled lime and BACK underlined coral
three unequal lime/off-white rules traversing the frame at different y positions
top-right BACK SHORTLY chip plus bottom-left 02 / PAUSED and bottom-right three coral registration marks

motion_system.dominant_motif: Pause and displacement: the coral pause bars physically push a typographic lane open, then the rails keep time while the message rests.
motion_system.blueprint: ticker-takeover adapted as a pause-symbol takeover
motion_system.build: 0.00-2.50s: three rails whip right-to-left; the outlined square drops in with a slight -9-to--4 degree settle; pause bars stamp down one after the other and physically displace ghost BACK text; BE, RIGHT, BACK snap in as separate blocks from alternating y directions, with RIGHT arriving last in lime.
motion_system.breathe: 2.50-6.55s: hero copy stays readable; pause bars compress together by 10px and release every 1.35s as a bounded tactile pulse; speed rails continue short finite passes; ghost marquee drifts left while the coral bloom slowly breathes. At 5.05s the coral underline wipes beneath BACK as the only pattern interrupt.
motion_system.resolve: 6.55-8.00s: rails reverse along their exact tracks, pause bars lift and return to the opening edge positions, square rotation unwinds, and marquee offset returns to zero. Headline uses a quick masked fold then returns to its initial hidden edge state on the last frames, making frame 480 connect to frame 0 without a visual jump.
motion_system.easing: power3.out for rail whips, back.out(1.55) for stamps, power2.inOut for displacement, sine.inOut for bounded pulse and reset
motion_system.determinism: Finite timeline passes only; all rail offsets and pause compression are predeclared constants; no infinite repeat, random, runtime clock, or layout tween.

customize.contrast: Warm off-white and lime carry all readable text on navy; coral is used in large pause geometry and underline only.

scenes.motion: Mechanical rail whip, reactive displacement, pause-bar stamp, and staggered block typography build the intermission state.
Headline holds while pause bars perform bounded compression-release pulses, rails make finite passes, and the marquee drifts.
All mechanical paths reverse and typography folds to the opening edge state for an exact seamless reset.
